name: 🪄Fabri
description:
Do you want Simon to saw the guy's hands off for you? Because he will. He's joking. Not really.

Translation:

hello

apologies for messaging so late

but

i was trying a new trick and

it seems that i am stuck with my hands behind my back

help

Uhhhhhh I dunno I just wanted to make a magic man :P
